Admin static vendor inventory (replaces CDN per migration plan)
================================================================
Pinned assets under static/admin/vendor/:
- lineicons/ LineIcons.css + fonts/ (woff2, woff, ttf) — v2.0
- chartjs/chart.umd.min.js — Chart.js 4.4.0
- codemirror/ — CodeMirror 5.65.16 (lib, themes, addons, modes; json mode = copy of javascript.min.js)
- xlsx/xlsx.full.min.js — SheetJS 0.18.5
- cytoscape/cytoscape.min.js — 3.28.1

CDN removed from templates:
- cdn.lineicons.com
- cdn.jsdelivr.net (chart, codemirror, xlsx)
- unpkg.com (cytoscape)

Not CDN (kept as data/identifiers):
- Postman schema URLs in form options
- SVG xmlns in JS/CSS data URLs

Inline style= counts by area: see plan Phase 4; templates listed in grep during migration.

Tailwind-like utilities: concentrated under templates/documentation/** (media_manager, operations, dashboard, forms, details).
